summary: Improves the reliability of one-click updates when Planban restarts locally.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: Planban now handles the local restart step more carefully after a one-click update. The old server closes browser event connections, exits after a short grace period, and the restart helper can bring the updated app back as soon as the local port is ready.
